properties.name: tableName
properties.label: Form Table Name
properties.description: Joget form table name (without app_fd_ prefix). Example: trxEnrichment

properties.name: defaultSort
properties.label: Default Sort Field
properties.description: Default sort field (form element ID). Use 'dateCreated' or 'dateModified' for metadata fields.

properties.name: validationConfig
properties.label: Validation Config (JSON)
properties.description: JSON configuration for confidence overrides and validation rules. Example: {"confidenceOverrides": [{"triggerField": "internal_type", "setFields": {"type_confidence": "manual_override"}, "clearFields": []}]}

properties.name: maxPageSize
properties.label: Max Page Size
properties.description: Maximum allowed page size for GET /records (1-1000). Default: 200.

properties.name: enableBatchOperations
properties.label: Enable Batch Operations
properties.description: Enable split, merge, and confirm endpoints. Uncheck to disable these operations.

properties.name: info
properties.label: About
properties.value: Enrichment API provides form-agnostic REST endpoints. Configure the table name above. The plugin dynamically reads all form fields — no recompilation needed when form changes.
